title: Dynamitez
description:
As the name suggests, this mod adds an item called Dynamite, its a throwable TNT.

As the latest version of game utilizes bamboo for multiple crafting recipes, this also uses it to make dynamites.
body:
Dynamitez — a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21+ that adds throwable dynamite.

  Two items:
  - Dynamite — crafted from 2 gunpowder + 1 bamboo, stacks to 16, explodes on impact (power 2.0)
  - Bundled Dynamite — crafted from 4 dynamite, stacks to 8, much larger explosion (power 6.0)

  Both are throwable projectiles that explode on contact. Self-damage is halved. Found in the Combat creative tab. Fully recoded from scratch for 1.21+ on Fabric API.
